import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut j = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while j < n
    match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn parse_tokens(_ line: String) -> List<Int> 
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  tokens
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = parse_tokens(line)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut k = 0
let tn = tokens.len()
while k < tn
  match tokens.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut p = 0
let on = sorted.len()
while p < on
  match sorted.get(p)
  when Some(v)
    if p == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  p = p + 1
end
println(out)
